CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups. Do not edit manually. Sums the Amount of won Opportunities closed in the last N days where this Contact has the primary Opportunity Contact Role. The value of N is configured in NPPatch Settings | Donations | Donor Statistics. Uses the Won Opportunities for Hard Credit filter group.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The total gift amount from won Opportunities closed in the last N days where this Contact is the primary donor. N is set in NPPatch Settings.
CustomField.label: Total Gifts Last N Days
